name: spec
description: Official spec-kit adoption and gh-CLI issue sync for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Adopt spec-kit and sync task issues.
interface.longDescription: Spec packages consent-first official spec-kit adoption and label-free GitHub task-to-issue sync skills for Codex.
defaultPrompt: Use $spec-adopt to set up official spec-kit in this repository.
Use $spec-sync to preview spec-kit tasks as GitHub issues.
